notes: Cross-tabulation of badm_management_coverage.csv by IGBP class and by region (6-way regional bucket derived from ISO2 site-ID country-code prefix via countrycode::countrycode(..., 'un.regionsub.name'), NOT from network/hub membership). n_sites_with_badm is the denominator (sites with an extracted BIF file in this IGBP/region group); n_sites_positive / pct are computed over that denominator only.
